title: Smooth Sailing
description: A QOL pack to improve on Cobblemon's Official Modpack
body:
![Title for Minecraft Smooth Sailing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb3d59cfb3a20c5fe6d14dd8ce27193bf488a9a8.png)

--------------------

Minecraft **Smooth Sailing** takes Cobblemon’s Official Modpack to the _next level_, while still _keeping it true_ to the base Cobblemon 1.6.1 version onwards.

Each mod relating to Cobblemon complements the next, like **Cobblemon Unchained** and **Cobbreeding** (which add more competitive options). This pack additionally will be trailing Cobblemon’s progress and will be released the _closest it can_ to the official modpacks release every update (that's the plan at least).

Additionally, mods separate from Cobblemon that have been added also complement the main mod in some ways shape or form (like **Inmis** giving you more space to leave any held items or **Dungeons and Taverns** encouraging adventure and exploration). 

Progress the same as you would with regular **Cobblemon**, but also enjoy the new additions to the game which make it _that_ much better.

--------------------

Please check the **modpack itself** or the **changelog** to see mod removals/additions and updates!
